MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ANTICO, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT ROYAL TAXI CAB (BEDDAR, BENHAMIMI) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROYAL TAXI CAB (BEDDAR, BENHAMIMI) THE INCIDENT OCCURED ON 02/13/03 & PLTF FILED PERSONAL INJURY LAWSUIT IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT ON 02/15/05. PLTF FILED SUIT 2 YEARS & 2 DAYS AFTER INCIDENT. FEBRUARY 14, 2005 WAS A MONDAY, A NON- HOLIDAY. PLTF HAS NOT FILED HIS ACTION WITHIN 2 YEARS PURSUANT TO CC 335.1. ACCORDINGLY, PLTF'S ACTION IS HEREBY DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
